testcase.name: test_create_student_with_parent_success

failure.message: AssertionError: Student creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_student_f1872983@nassaq.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}},{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","parent","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_parent_f1872983@nassaq.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} assert False

testcase.failure: tests/test_user_creation_and_student_wizard.py:272: in test_create_student_with_parent_success assert False, f"Student creation failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Student creation failed: {"detail":[{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_student_f1872983@nassaq.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}},{"type":"value_error","loc":["body","parent","email"],"msg":"value is not a valid email address: The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email.","input":"test_parent_f1872983@nassaq.local","ctx":{"reason":"The part after the @-sign is a special-use or reserved name that cannot be used with email."}}]} E assert False

testcase.name: test_get_users_list

failure.message: AssertionError: Get users failed: Internal Server Error assert 500 == 200 + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code

testcase.failure: tests/test_user_creation_and_student_wizard.py:345: in test_get_users_list assert response.status_code == 200, f"Get users failed: {response.text}" E AssertionError: Get users failed: Internal Server Error E assert 500 == 200 E + where 500 = <Response [500]>.status_code
